recommendations.title: Female Prisoner Scorpion: Jailhouse 41
recommendations.overview: After being used and betrayed by the detective she had fallen in love with, young Matsu is sent to a female prison full of sadistic guards and disobedient prisoners.

recommendations.title: American History X
recommendations.overview: Derek Vineyard is paroled after serving 3 years in prison for killing two African-American men. Through his brother, Danny Vineyard's narration, we learn that before going to prison, Derek was a skinhead and the leader of a violent white supremacist

recommendations.title: The Longest Yard
recommendations.overview: Disgraced pro football quarterback Paul Crewe lands in a Texas federal penitentiary, where manipulative Warden Hazen recruits him to advise the institution's football team of prison guards. Crewe suggests a tune-up game which lands him quarterbacking

recommendations.title: Punishment Park
recommendations.overview: In this fictional documentary, U.S. prisons are at capacity, and President Nixon declares a state of emergency. All new prisoners, most of whom are connected to the antiwar movement, are now given the choice of jail time or spending three days in Pun

recommendations.title: Pelé: Birth of a Legend
recommendations.overview: The life story of Brazilian football legend, Pele.

recommendations.title: The Experiment
recommendations.overview: 20 men are chosen to participate in the roles of guards and prisoners in a psychological study that ultimately spirals out of control.

recommendations.title: Blind Dating
recommendations.overview: Danny is a blind man who does not let his impairment get in the way of living his life to the fullest, except when it comes to love. Danny's brother sets him up on a series of blind dates, but all of them go disastrously wrong. Just when Danny is abo

recommendations.title: Summer of '92
recommendations.overview: The 1992 Danish football team competes for the European Championship.

recommendations.title: The Stanford Prison Experiment
recommendations.overview: In 1971, Stanford's Professor Philip Zimbardo conducts a controversial psychology experiment in which college students pretend to be either prisoners or guards, but the proceedings soon get out of hand. Based on a true story.

recommendations.title: Stalag 17
recommendations.overview: After two American prisoners are killed by guards in the act of escaping from a German POW camp in World War II, barracks black marketeer J.J. Sefton is suspected of being an informer.
